summary: Classified the hydrated live PR inventory shard without planning closes, merges, labels, comments, or fix PRs. The shard has no shared canonical by design; open maintainer-owned PRs remain open as related or independent work, the active transcript tracker remains related context, and the exact security-sensitive linked PR is routed to central security handling.
